name: Trace a data source to action
steps: open Source Catalogue > select source > Trace Source > view lineage > open object > view graph/vector > view workflow > view action > replay audit
dead_end_prevention: every step has back path, evidence link and Jarvis explain option

name: Create Gotham case from live alert
steps: open COP > select alert > inspect evidence > generate briefing > create case > assign task > audit written
dead_end_prevention: if evidence missing, show request evidence action

name: Apollo rollout with health gates
steps: open desired state > compare drift > open rollout > verify gates > promote wave > monitor health > pause/rollback if needed
dead_end_prevention: failed gate opens remediation and rollback

name: AIP governed action proposal
steps: ask Jarvis > context builder filters objects > graph/vector retrieval > model proposes action > policy gate > approval panel > action engine > audit
dead_end_prevention: blocked actions show policy reason and required approval

name: OCR document to evidence object
steps: open source > select document candidate > terms check > OCR pipeline > citation anchors > document object > vector chunks > evidence chain
dead_end_prevention: low OCR confidence opens manual review workflow
